page.title: Products
page.permissionNote: Only administrators and managers can modify products. You can still review the catalog.

table.marginNoSales: No sales in the last 30 days
table.marginUnavailable: Margin data could not be loaded. Product management remains available.

semantic.toggleHint: Match by meaning, not exact text. Falls back to text search when AI is off.
semantic.unavailable: Semantic search needs AI enabled and embeddings generated. Falling back to text search.
semantic.noResults: No products matched the meaning of your query.
semantic.regenerated_one: Embedded {{count}} product. Semantic search is ready.
semantic.regenerated_other: Embedded {{count}} products. Semantic search is ready.
semantic.regenerateUnavailable: Cannot regenerate: enable AI in Company settings and ensure the OpenAI key is set.

embeddingDrift.title: Embeddings out of date
embeddingDrift.description: After switching AI providers some products still carry vectors from the previous embedding model, so semantic search will skip them silently. Regenerate to bring them back into results.

fields.name: Name
fields.stockHelp: Use direct stock only for products that do not track lots or serial numbers.
fields.tracksLotsHelp: Receive inventory in named batches with optional expiry dates and FEFO consumption.
fields.tracksLotsEnabledHelp: Stock is managed from lot-aware inventory entries. Existing stock must be zero before this control can be enabled.
fields.tracksLotsStockHelp: Read-only while lot tracking is enabled. Use an inventory entry with lot evidence.
fields.tracksLotsStockError: Stock must be zero before lot tracking can be enabled.
fields.tracksSerialsHelp: Receive and sell each physical unit by its exact serial, with sale and warranty provenance.
fields.tracksSerialsEnabledHelp: Stock is managed from serial-aware inventory receipts. Existing stock must be zero before this control can be enabled.
fields.tracksSerialsStockHelp: Read-only while serial tracking is enabled. Receive each unit with its serial from Inventory.
fields.trackedStockError: Stock must be zero before lot or serial tracking can be enabled.
fields.sellByFractionHelp: Enable this when the product can be sold in decimal quantities such as meters, kilograms, or liters.

units.title: Unit assignments
units.description: Define the base unit and any additional equivalence-based sale units.
units.serialEquivalenceRequired: Every sale unit must equal one base unit while serial tracking is enabled.

providerAssignments.title: Provider associations
providerAssignments.description: Link this product to one or more suppliers.
providerAssignments.empty: No providers linked. Click "Add Provider" to associate a supplier.

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: How the product appears in your catalog and receipts.

classification.title: Classification
classification.description: Sets taxes and how it is grouped in reports.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Initial stock and the reorder threshold.

deactivate.title: Deactivate Product
deactivate.description: This will mark as inactive. You can reactivate it later by editing the record.

variants.createExplainer: Define up to three axes. Each generated combination becomes a regular sellable product with its own SKU, stock and barcode. This conversion cannot be undone.
variants.existingExplainer: The matrix parent is catalog-only. Every row below is an independent sellable product with its own inventory.
variants.stockBlocked: Move this product to zero stock at every site before creating variants.
variants.optionsHelp: Separate each option with a comma.

validation.valuesRequired: Add at least one option to every axis.
validation.duplicateValue: Options within an axis must be unique.
validation.tooManyOptions: Each axis supports at most 20 options.
validation.tooManyCombinations: A matrix can contain at most 100 combinations.
validation.tooLong: Axis names and options must be 40 characters or fewer.
